name: method
value: Uses ZYX Euler attitude from RATM 500 Hz synchronized CSVs to project the body-Z axis onto the velocity direction. The absolute projection is a sign-convention-safe thrust-axis proxy, not a calibrated force. Compare it with current drag/max-thrust demand only as a feasibility guard.
note: Do not fit CdA directly from these powered racing windows without reconstructing actual thrust magnitude, prop unloading, wind, and coordinate conventions.
